trigger_condition.note: Discrete unit count increases at equity milestones: $1K→1u, $2.5K→2u, $4K→3u, $10K→5u, $50K→6u (max 7u)

sizing_rule.note: Tharp's equity-scaled unit pyramiding: increase discrete trading units (not size-per-unit) as account grows through predefined equity thresholds, contingent on consistent profitability at current unit count. This is anti-martingale scaled on account growth.

source_rule_text: Increase the number of trading units progressively as account equity grows, scaling position count in discrete steps tied to per-unit capital thresholds.
